title: requets PyPI Package Typosquats requests Library Running Credential Theft via setup.py at Install Time
description: The malicious PyPI package requets used a one-character transposition to typosquat the popular requests HTTP library, running credential-stealing code in setup.py at install time that exfiltrated environment variables and SSH keys before most developers noticed the misspelling.
label: AV-200

title: colorama-py PyPI Package Typosquats colorama Terminal Coloring Library Targeting Python Developers
description: The malicious PyPI package colorama-py used a hyphenated suffix to typosquat the widely-used colorama Python library for colorizing terminal output, executing a postinstall payload that stole environment variables, SSH keys, and developer credentials from compromised systems.
label: AV-200

title: selemium PyPI Package Typosquats selenium Browser Automation Library Stealing CI/CD Environment Secrets
description: The malicious PyPI package selemium used a character transposition to typosquat the popular selenium browser automation library, targeting QA engineers and developers running automated browser tests by stealing CI/CD environment secrets and authentication tokens during package installation.
label: AV-200

title: solana-test Malicious PyPI Package Impersonates Solana Testing Framework to Steal Private Keys and Source Code
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-test published by a threat actor in May 2025 impersonated a legitimate Solana blockchain testing framework, stealing cryptocurrency wallet private keys and Python source code files from developer file systems and transmitting them to attacker-controlled servers.
label: AV-200

title: solana-token PyPI Package Brandjacks Solana Name to Distribute Cryptocurrency Credential-Stealing Malware
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-token brandjacked the Solana cryptocurrency name to masquerade as a legitimate token management utility, deploying credential-stealing malware that targeted Solana wallet private keys and cryptocurrency exchange API credentials from compromised developer systems.
label: AV-200

title: xlsc-to-json-lh PyPI Package Typosquats xlsx-to-json-lc Excel Converter with 1500 Weekly Downloads to Delete Project Directories
description: The malicious PyPI package xlsc-to-json-lh used a one-letter transposition to typosquat the legitimate xlsx-to-json-lc Excel to JSON converter with over 1500 weekly downloads, deploying a destructive payload capable of deleting entire developer project directories without warning or recovery options.
label: AV-200

title: dexscreener-charts PyPI Brandjacking Package Impersonates DexScreener DeFi Analytics to Steal Crypto Credentials
description: The malicious PyPI package dexscreener-charts brandjacked the DexScreener decentralized exchange analytics platform name to distribute cryptocurrency credential-stealing malware targeting DeFi developers, stealing wallet private keys and exchange API tokens from compromised developer machines.
label: AV-200

title: @typescript_eslinter/eslint npm Package Uses Fake Scope to Typosquat typescript-eslint Gaining Hundreds of Daily Downloads
description: Attackers uploaded a malicious npm package named @typescript_eslinter/eslint using an underscore in the scope name to visually mimic the legitimate @typescript-eslint linting package, gaining hundreds of downloads daily before detection by exploiting developer confusion between hyphen and underscore scope naming.
label: AV-200

title: @types-node npm Fake Scope Package Typosquats @types/node TypeScript Definitions Attracting 1000 Downloads Per Day
description: The malicious npm package @types-node used a hyphen instead of a slash to create a visually similar but distinct scope that typosquatted the widely-used @types/node TypeScript type definitions package, attracting nearly 1,000 downloads per day from TypeScript developers who missed the subtle naming difference.
label: AV-200

title: aliyun-ai-labs-snippets-sdk PyPI Package Impersonates Aliyun AI SDK Deploying Infostealer Hidden in PyTorch Model
description: The malicious PyPI package aliyun-ai-labs-snippets-sdk impersonated a legitimate Aliyun AI Labs Python SDK, delivering an infostealer payload hidden inside a PyTorch model loaded from the initialization script, collecting over 1,700 downloads across three related packages within 24 hours before removal.
label: AV-200

title: colorizr-plus npm Package Typosquats colorizr Color Conversion Library Stealing Developer Credentials on Installation
description: A malicious npm package typosquatting the colorizr color conversion JavaScript library used a -plus suffix to appear as an enhanced version, executing credential-stealing postinstall code that collected npm authentication tokens, GitHub credentials, and CI/CD environment variables from developer workstations.
label: AV-200

title: graphalgo PyPI Package Typosquats graphdict Graph Library Impersonating Renamed Legitimate Package to Confuse Developers
description: The malicious PyPI package graphalgo presented itself as a graph manipulation library, exploiting the recent renaming of the legitimate graphalgo project to graphdict to confuse developers searching for the original package name and installing the malicious impersonator instead.
label: AV-200

title: express-cookie-parser npm Package Typosquats cookie-parser Express Middleware Modifying Legitimate Package Files to Evade Detection
description: The malicious npm package express-cookie-parser typosquatted the popular cookie-parser Express middleware library, modifying legitimate package files including __init__.py and index.js to remove traces of tampering while deploying credential-stealing code targeting Express web application developers.
label: AV-200

title: Baileys WhatsApp Library Malicious Fork Abuses Trust in Popular Ecosystem Component to Infiltrate Dependency Trees
description: A malicious fork of the Baileys WhatsApp web API library abused trust in the popular ecosystem component to infiltrate dependency trees, using credential abuse and supply chain manipulation techniques to inject malicious code into CI/CD pipelines consuming the compromised fork as a dependency.
label: AV-200

title: larpexodus PyPI Package Typosquats Legitimate Package Downloading Windows Binary Payload in MUT-8694 Campaign
description: The malicious PyPI package larpexodus uploaded on October 10 2024 triggered a GuardDog alert for downloading and executing an externally hosted Windows binary, identified as part of the broader MUT-8694 cross-ecosystem typosquatting campaign targeting developers across both npm and PyPI registries.
label: AV-200

title: Xygeni Documents 230 Malicious npm and PyPI Packages in February 2026 Including Version Inflation and Internal Tool Impersonation Campaigns
description: Xygeni research confirmed more than 230 malicious packages across npm and PyPI in February 2026 alone, documenting automation-driven publishing waves, aggressive version inflation campaigns, and internal tool impersonation alongside classic typosquatting incidents targeting developer CI/CD pipelines.
label: AV-200

title: sol-prices PyPI Brandjacking Package Uses Solana Brand to Distribute Source Code and Private Key Theft Malware
description: The malicious PyPI package sol-prices used the Solana cryptocurrency brand to masquerade as a legitimate price feed utility, deploying malware that stole Python source code files and Solana private keys from developer systems as part of a coordinated eleven-package attack campaign in May 2025.
label: AV-200

title: solana-live PyPI Package Impersonates Real-Time Solana Data Tool Targeting Blockchain Developer Credentials and Keys
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-live impersonated a legitimate real-time Solana blockchain data utility, targeting blockchain developers with credential-stealing malware designed to extract Solana wallet private keys and cryptocurrency exchange authentication tokens from compromised development environments.
label: AV-200

title: 222000 Available Package Name Variations Identified Across npm and PyPI Creating Massive Systematic Typosquatting Attack Surface
description: Academic research analyzing supply chain attacks from January 2024 through October 2025 identified over 222,000 available package name variations across npm and PyPI through systematic character mutation analysis, demonstrating the scale of the typosquatting attack surface available to attackers targeting popular libraries.
label: AV-200

title: PyPI Removes Hundreds of Malicious Typosquats Per Month in 2024 as Checkmarx and Phylum Track Automated Campaign Scale
description: Checkmarx and Phylum reported throughout 2024 that PyPI removed hundreds of malicious typosquatting packages per month, with consistent setup.py payload patterns that exfiltrated environment variables and SSH keys, demonstrating that typosquatting has reached industrial automated scale in the Python ecosystem.
label: AV-200

title: solana-charts PyPI Package Brandjacks Solana Ecosystem to Steal Cryptocurrency Developer Credentials in Eleven-Package Campaign
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-charts brandjacked the Solana cryptocurrency ecosystem name across an eleven-package coordinated campaign, stealing cryptocurrency wallet credentials and source code from blockchain developers in a coordinated attack that split payloads across four distinct malware variants.
label: AV-200

title: GlueStack npm Packages Compromised Injecting Malicious Code into lib/commonjs/index.js Targeting React Native Developers
description: Over a dozen GlueStack npm packages used by React Native developers were compromised by injecting malicious code into lib/commonjs/index.js files, targeting the mobile application development community with credential-stealing payloads that executed during application import rather than installation.
label: AV-200

title: semantic-types PyPI Package Benign on Upload Receives Malicious Payload Update 35 Days Later Targeting Solana Developers
description: The PyPI package semantic-types was completely benign when first uploaded on December 22 2024 but received a malicious credential-stealing payload update on January 26 2025, exploiting the trust developers had built in the package's clean installation history to evade security review.
label: AV-200

title: solana-coin PyPI Package Uses Cryptocurrency Brandjacking to Deploy Four-Payload Malware Split Across Coordinated Campaign
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-coin used Solana cryptocurrency brandjacking as part of an eleven-package coordinated attack campaign that split malicious functionality across four distinct payloads, stealing cryptocurrency credentials and Python source code from developers working in the Solana blockchain ecosystem.
label: AV-200

title: Typosquatting Package Lifetime Reduced from Days to Hours by Improved Detection Systems but Remains Profitable Attack Vector
description: Academic research documented that improved typosquatting detection systems across npm and PyPI dramatically reduced malicious package lifetime from days or weeks to hours, but determined that even short exposure windows remain profitable for attackers due to the massive scale of automated package downloads in modern software development.
label: AV-200

title: solana-trade PyPI Brandjacking Package Targets DeFi Trading Application Developers with Private Key Exfiltration Malware
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-trade used Solana blockchain brandjacking to target developers building decentralized finance trading applications, deploying private key exfiltration malware that stole Solana wallet credentials and source code from compromised developer machines as part of a coordinated multi-package campaign.
label: AV-200

title: dexscreener-data PyPI Package Impersonates DeFi Analytics Platform Stealing Developer API Keys and Wallet Credentials
description: The malicious PyPI package dexscreener-data impersonated the DexScreener decentralized exchange data analytics platform, stealing developer API keys and cryptocurrency wallet credentials from blockchain application developers as part of an eleven-package coordinated typosquatting and brandjacking campaign in May 2025.
label: AV-200

title: solana-data PyPI Package Targets Data Science and Analytics Developers Working with Solana Blockchain Infrastructure
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-data targeted data scientists and analytics developers working with Solana blockchain data infrastructure, deploying credential-stealing malware that collected Solana private keys, exchange API tokens, and Python source code files from developer file systems.
label: AV-200

title: solana-test-suite PyPI Package Impersonates Testing Infrastructure Tooling to Steal Blockchain Developer Credentials
description: The malicious PyPI package solana-test-suite impersonated legitimate Solana blockchain testing infrastructure tooling, exploiting developer trust in testing packages that typically run with elevated environment access to steal private keys, exchange credentials, and Python source code from compromised development environments.
label: AV-200

title: Internal Tool Impersonation Emerges Alongside Classic Typosquatting as Growing npm and PyPI Supply Chain Attack Technique in 2026
description: Xygeni researchers documented internal tool impersonation as a growing supply chain attack technique alongside classic typosquatting in 2026, where attackers registered public packages using names that matched common enterprise internal tool naming patterns to trick developers into installing malicious packages they believed were internal company tools.
label: AV-200
